reviews.comment:
Muy agradable, los chicos atienden muy bien en el salón, espacio tranquilo para un recreo en medio de la rutina, un poco caro en los alimentos tipo sandwich, pero con la  buena atención, no se siente tanto. Ambiente climatizado, luminoso y agradable!!!

(Translated by Google)
Very pleasant, the staff are very attentive in the cafeteria, a quiet space for a break from the routine. The sandwiches are a bit pricey, but with the excellent service, it's not so bad. Air-conditioned, bright, and comfortable!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11217960365668624520/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBbk5YRkxnEAE

reviews.comment:
